target: 8. Years From Now
Ah~, I'm hungry~. Let me eat your curry when we get back, Shinpei.
Hey, I just got back today, you know? After dragging me all over the island, you're going to make me cook on top of that?
What are you saying over something like this. Didn't your stamina drop after leaving the island?
You...
Well, if you don't want to, that's fine. Ah~, I really wanted to eat Shinpei's curry for the first time in a while.
Alright, alright. But you have to help too.
Yay~! I'm going to look forward to it~!
He's really soft on Sis. Right, Kaori-chan.
Hehe, that's true…
(Yes, ever since back then...)
(That's why... it's a good thing that we didn't find the time capsule today.)
(Because...)
(What I put in that time capsule was... a <color=#GF_TIPS_074>love letter</color> to Ajiro-kun.)
(A letter I wrote with all my might, but couldn't give to him in the end. I couldn't muster up that kind of courage back then.)
(I thought that maybe the adult me, after time had passed, would be able to give it to him... And that's why I put it in that box.)
(But... I actually already knew.)
(The day I can give it to him will surely never come, even when I'm an adult. Because...)
(Because Kofune-san was always at the end of Ajiro-kun's gaze.)
(I think I knew... that wouldn't change even when we became adults...)
(If the day ever truly comes when we open the time capsule...)
(What will I tell Ajiro-kun then?)
I wonder how many more years it will take... for me to shake off these feelings.
Huh, did you say something?
Nope, nothing at all!
